## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the "New skill" issue / brief if applicable: Closes #___ -->

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Docs / other

## Checklist (CI enforces the starred items)

- [ ] Started from a **detailed brief** (issue linked), not a one-liner
- [ ] ⭐ `SKILL.md` frontmatter: `name` matches the folder + trigger-rich `description`
- [ ] Detail lives in `references/` (progressive disclosure), SKILL.md body stays lean
- [ ] ⭐ Skill has a **`README.md`**
- [ ] ⭐ Skill has an **`assets/banner.png`** (via `scripts/make-banner.js`)
- [ ] ⭐ **Plugin `README.md` skills table updated** with the new skill
- [ ] Follows Unity conventions (English; plan → self-review → Next Step; palette; *fit the use case*; boundaries)
- [ ] No `WIP` markers on an active skill
- [ ] **Tested on a real Unity example** — result pasted below
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_plugin.py` passes locally

## Test evidence

<!-- Paste the real example you ran the skill on and the output, so reviewers can see it works. -->

<!-- Anything you want the maintainer/peer to focus on. -->
